'''Formayj''' was a male [[Yao]] and an old associate of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] who worked out of [[Tholatin]]. When Chewbacca went to rescue Han during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], he went to Formayj to find information about the [[Yevetha]] and the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. He was not known to haggle, and was old enough to have created many tricks of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] trade. He carefully appraised the worth of each item and piece of information he sold before parting with it. Much of the information he garnered came directly from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]], and in fact [[Alpha Blue]] used him to funnel information to Chewbacca.
